name_fa: نیروی دریایی سپاه پاسداران انقلاب اسلامی
description: The IRGC Navy (Niru-ye Daryayi-ye Sepah, NEDSA) is the naval arm of the [Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps](/orgs/islamic-revolutionary-guard-corps), operating separately from the Artesh Navy (NEDAJA). NEDSA focuses on asymmetric warfare in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz: fast-attack craft, anti-ship missiles, sea mines, and harassment of foreign naval and commercial vessels. It controls a network of island bases in the Persian Gulf and has been responsible for numerous documented seizures and confrontations with US Navy vessels in the Gulf. NEDSA doctrine centers on area-denial and the ability to close the Strait of Hormuz in a conflict scenario.

sources.title: Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps Navy — Wikipedia
Iran's Military Forces and Warfighting Capabilities — CSIS
sources.publisher: Center for Strategic and International Studies

editorial_notes: NEDSA (IRGC Navy) is entirely separate from NEDAJA (Artesh Navy, already in DB as islamic-republic-of-iran-navy). Do not conflate the two.
